title: Risk-on tone across markets boosts sentiment
section_path: Risk-on tone across markets boosts sentiment
section_path_text: Risk-on tone across markets boosts sentiment
summary:
Main
Markets remained well supported by the prospect of easing monetary policy. This helped reverse earlier losses on signs of weak demand. By Daniel Hynes

Market Commentary
A broader risk-on tone across global markets helped push crude oil prices higher.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Markets remained well supported by the prospect of easing monetary policy. This helped reverse earlier losses on signs of weak demand.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: A broader risk-on tone across global markets helped push crude oil prices higher. Mixed economic data in the US boosted bets that the Federal Reserve will cut rates sooner rather than later.
